chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of Grandfathers and Grandmothers

text: 5633 - وَ رَوَى أَبَانٌ عَنْ بُكَيْرٍ وَ اَلْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "لِلْإِخْوَةِ مِنَ اَلْأُمِّ اَلثُّلُثُ مَعَ اَلْجَدِّ وَ هُوَ شَرِيكُ اَلْإِخْوَةِ مِنَ اَلْأَبِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.5633 - Aban narrated from Bukayr and Al-Halabi from one of the two Imams (peace be upon them) who said: "The maternal siblings are entitled to one-third of the inheritance along with the grandfather, and the grandfather shares the inheritance with the paternal siblings."
